Lyrics.text:
1. Jeso Tompo! Vatolampy,
Vato voafantina,
Mba ho fanorena-mafy
Izay tsy mety levona;
:,: Vato mafy :,:\ (in-2)
Dia itokianay.
2. Jeso Tompo! Vatolampy
Voazaha toetra;
Vato tsy mba misy tsiny,
Sady tsara endrika:
:,: Vato soa :,:\ (in-2)
Dia ifalianay.
3. Jeso Tompo! Vatolampy,
Vato fehizoronay;
Efa nampiray fanahy
Ny fitianao anay
:,: Fehizoro :,:\ (in2)
Vato fampiraisana.
4. Jeso Tompo! Vatolampy,
Tsy miova Hianao;
Manan-jara ny matoky
Ny tsy fivadihanao,
:,: Fa ho faly :,: \ (in-2)
Ka tsy hanan-kenatra.
